name: Sassy Onion Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
3. Cover and chill in the refrigerator.
4. Stir before serving to combine any separated layers.
5. Serve with fresh vegetables or Krunchers Potato Chips.
6. Store leftovers in the refrigerator.
